description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black metal body and a curved magazine. The upper receiver is encased in a tubular wire folding stock, which runs parallel to the barrel and provides structural reinforcement. The grip is made of dark brown wood or polymer with deep vertical grooves for enhanced ergonomics and a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, offering ample space for finger placement and protection. The barrel is short and cylindrical, with a simple muzzle and no visible threading or compensator. Minimalistic markings are present, with only subtle engravings or stamps visible on the receiver, contributing to its understated, functional appearance.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a wire folding stock, grooved brown grip, and curved magazine. Its design is utilitarian with minimal markings and a robust build.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular muzzle, wire stock framing the barrel, and the symmetrical alignment of the upper receiver.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full length of the wire stock, the curved magazine, and the textured brown grip.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip, the top of the receiver, and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the opposite side of the receiver, the magazine, and the ergonomic grip contours.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark brown, likely made of wood or polymer, with pronounced vertical grooves running along its length for improved ergonomics and slip resistance. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, featuring subtle finger grooves and a slightly flared base for stability. The surface appears matte with a slightly textured finish, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing function over decoration.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a thick profile that provides ample protection for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured without sharp edges or undercuts, and there are no visible texturing or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and ease of access.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, with a plain, unthreaded muzzle and no visible compensator or porting. It has a smooth, matte black finish that matches the rest of the firearm, and there are no external markings or decorative features on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: There are minimal markings on the slide or receiver, with only subtle engravings or stamps visible on the left side. These markings are understated and do not include prominent logos, model names, or serial numbers, contributing to the firearm's utilitarian appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly curved to match the contour of the magazine, with a flat bottom and no visible extensions or finger rests. It is simple in design, lacking logos or texturing, and is designed for efficient insertion and removal.
